column1: # Fork verification bases — fork PR branches the addon matrix may verify a bundle against.
# Default validation runs an addon bundle against CLEAN upstream/maintenance/gramps<ver>.
# A bundle whose change lives on a FORK's open PR branch (e.g. .github/ CI infra the
# clean base does not carry) cannot even `git apply` there. Such a bundle declares
# `- **Verification base:** <remote>/<branch>` in its brief; `make fork-worktrees` reads
# this manifest to build a dedicated `addons-source-<ver>-fork` worktree checked out at
# that branch, and run-verify.sh / run-addon-unit.sh verify against it instead of the
# shared clean `addons-source-<ver>` (which other batched bundles keep). <remote> names
# a remote on ../addons-source (origin = the fork, upstream = gramps-project).

column4: addons-source PR #820 — CI/CD pipeline (.github/ infra) on the eduralph fork, gramps60 line
